title: Mascom (Mass Commands)
description: Run any command as often as you like AT ONCE and easier than ever before :)
body:
Ever wanted to run one command multiple times but at once and without spamming the up-arrow and enter-key? This datapack makes it possible, easier than ever before! ### How to use Just run ``` function mascom:run {c:"",i:""} ``` and replace with the desired command and with how often you want the command to be run, it's easy as that :) ### Examples ``` function mascom:run {c:"summon sheep ~ ~ ~",i:"100"} ``` Summons 100 sheep at the players position ``` function mascom:run {c:"kill @e[type=!player]",i:"2"} ``` Kills everything but the player, twice. This instantly gets rid of any items the killed mobs might drop.
NOTE: Running `kill @e` will break most other datapacks ``` function mascom:run {c:"execute if predicate {'condition':'minecraft:random_chance','chance':0.1} run say There's a 10% chance of this message being displayed!",i:"100"} ``` Of course you can also use this with conditional commands like `execute if`. You could use it to test probability-based events! ## Interested in making your own datapacks? I am one of the founders of **Datapack Hub**, the perfect discord server for helping you do just that! Whether you are just getting started or have advanced questions, with ~2500 members and our team of verified helpers, we got you covered!
_(This is a passion project and I am not getting paid for promotion)_
[![Click here to join the Datapack Hub Discord server!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732bc1ebde78aeed750745d52cb9089900b63d9a.png)](https://discord.com/invite/aEXsdjjdu4)
